name: hammer
description: Tools used for striking, driving nails, breaking materials and performing carpentry, construction and repair tasks

name: power_drill
description: High-performance electric power drill featuring a variable speed trigger, reversible motor, and adjustable torque settings for precise drilling and fastening tasks.

name: drywall_screws
description: Premium bugle head drywall screws with a sharp point and fine thread, engineered for securely fastening gypsum boards to wood or light-gauge metal studs.

name: copper_wire_12awg
description: High-conductivity 12 AWG copper wire insulated with a durable flame-retardant jacket, ideal for reliable residential and commercial electrical wiring up to 20 Amps.
